title: Settings
subtitle: Manage pricing, notifications, data, and hooks

pricing.title: Model Pricing
pricing.description: Rates per million tokens (USD). Use % as wildcard in patterns.
pricing.validationRequired: Pattern and display name are required

hooks.title: Hook Configuration
hooks.description: Claude Code hooks forward events to the dashboard in real time.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Browser notifications for important events. Requires permission.
notifications.disabledInfo: Notifications are disabled - enable to get alerts for session events

import.title: Import History
import.description: Bring existing Claude Code sessions into the dashboard. Token counts, per-model cost, compactions, subagents, tool uses, and turn durations are reconstructed from the original JSONL transcripts — identical to how live sessions are captured.
import.accuracyNote: Re-running is safe. Sessions are deduplicated by session ID, and compaction baselines ensure token totals never double-count.
import.stepLocateBody: Every Claude Code session is stored as a JSONL transcript under the projects folder. Each subfolder is named after the working directory where the session started (slashes replaced with dashes).
import.stepArchiveBody: To move history from another machine, archive the whole folder first, then copy it over (AirDrop, scp, USB, cloud storage):
import.stepChooseBody: Rescan the default location, point at any folder you've extracted history into, or upload files/archives directly.
import.stepVerifyBody: After import, open Analytics → Cost to confirm the breakdown. Re-importing the same session is always safe.
import.modeFolderDesc: Scan any directory on this machine for JSONL transcripts (walks subfolders).
import.modeUploadDesc: Drop JSONL files or an archive (.zip / .tar.gz) directly into the browser.
import.folderHelper: Absolute path. Tilde (~) is expanded. Subfolders are scanned recursively.
import.dropzoneHint: Drag files here or click to select

errors.noJsonl: No .jsonl files were found in the uploaded content

data.title: Data Management
data.cleanupDesc: Abandon stale sessions and purge old data
data.abandonAfter: Abandon stale active sessions older than

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.description: Irreversible actions that delete data permanently
danger.warning: This will delete all sessions, agents, events, and token data. Are you sure?
